title: mentha fruticetorum
intro: Mentha fruticetorum, also known as Woolly Mint or Woolly Peppermint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha fruticetorum include relief from nausea, headaches, and fever, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and improve respiratory function. Mentha fruticetorum can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or tincture, making it a versatile herb for various applications in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
